model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("full_time ~ daca_eligible + C(year)", data=sample, weights=sample["perwt"])
sample_selection: hispan == 1 (Hispanic origin) and bpl == 200 (Mexican-born) and citizen == 3 (noncitizen)
birthyr between 1978 and 1999 and yrimmig between 1900 and 2012
perwt > 0 and uhrswork >= 1 (usual hours worked reported)
treatment_definition: daca_eligible = 1 when birthyr between 1982 and 1996, yrimmig <= 2007, and (yrimmig - birthyr) between 0 and 15, else 0
